description_long: This nightstand features a compact, rectangular form with a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The structure is supported by four straight legs, with a cross-brace design visible on the sides, adding both stability and a touch of visual interest. The front face includes a single drawer, indicated by a subtle horizontal line and a recessed handle, providing storage space for personal belongings. The overall finish is dark, likely a painted or stained wood, giving it a modern and understated appearance. The design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, focusing on functionality and clean lines. Its proportions and style make it suitable for placement in both residential and public urban environments.
description: A compact, dark-finished nightstand with a single drawer, straight legs, and cross-brace side supports. Minimalist and functional, with a flat top and recessed handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer and recessed handle, with straight legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cross-brace leg design and the solid, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back and straight legs, with no drawer or handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cross-brace leg design and minimalistic side profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
